string.text: Maximum PDA map travel speed (m/s virtual) for normal travel at normal weight. Default 50. Sneak and encumbrance slow this further, lengthening the map bar and journey time (and survival cost). Lower values slow all travel proportionally.
How long on-screen travel messages stay visible (seconds).

Ambush scan radius (not dodge chance): 50 m day base, minus 10 m dawn/dusk, minus 20 m night, minus weather (rain 10 m, storm 15 m, foggy 20 m — stacks). Travel-block radius stays 50 m. On ambush: pull back by scan radius (×2 sneaking, max 60 m). Hostiles alerted 1 s after spawn; you are invulnerable until then. Clear arrival: 5 m before destination when clear.
Chance to avoid an ambush before Scouting bonuses. Sneak mode doubles this. Time of day and weather do not change dodge chance. Default 20%; can only be lowered.
Rubles per 1000 meters of travel distance. Default 2000; can only be increased.
Show on-screen debug summary (sneak rolls, trip stats).
Write detailed travel debug lines to xray_khada.log via printf. Errors always log regardless of this setting.
When enabled, right-clicking a travel destination draws grey path dots on the PDA before you start a journey. Off by default.
Development keybind: increase Scouting skill level by 1.
Development keybind: decrease Scouting skill level by 1.
Hostiles are too close - deal with them before traveling.
You can only fast travel within the current zone. Use a zone exit or hire a guide.
Hostiles at destination - dropped short %d time(s) (unavoidable ambush).
You avoided %d encounter(s) along the way.
No encounters to avoid along the way.
